complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**短引脚定位不准**：使用 **短引脚模式**，整段引脚作为一个检测区域，定位: **Short leads are localized poorly**: use **Short-lead mode**, which inspects the whole lead as one region and tracks more reliably.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.将引脚区域划分为焊料、焊盘、引脚尖端三类子区域，分别用颜色范围二值化并计算有效比: Splits the lead region into three sub-zones — Solder, Pad, and Tip — binarizes each with its own color range to compute valid ratios, then combines mean/neighbor statistics for robust detection of solder bridges and lifted leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**核心思路**：将引脚区域划分为 **焊料（Solder）/ 焊盘（Pad）/: **Core idea**: split the lead area into three sub-zones — **Solder**, **Pad**, and **Tip** — and binarize each with its own color range to obtain valid ratios. Combine those with **mean / neighbor** statistics for robust detection of solder bridges and lifted leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.区域划分：上 = **焊盘区（Pad，橙色框）**，下 = **引脚尖端（Tip: Zone layout: top = **Pad** (orange box), bottom = **Tip** (red box), middle = **Solder**.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊盘长度 (像素)（Pad Length / ext_top）/ 引脚长度: **Pad Length (pixels) / Lead Length (pixels)** (``ext_top`` / ``ext_bottom``): extend the ROI up and down along the lead's normal direction so it fully covers the pad and the lead. Enter a value directly, or drag on the canvas.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚尖端长度 (像素)（Tip Length）**：引脚末端 Tip 子区域: **Tip Length (pixels)**: length of the Tip sub-zone at the end of each lead.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚数量（Lead Count）/ 引脚宽度 (mm)（Lead Width: **Lead Count / Lead Width (mm)**: divide the ROI into equal sub-frames that align with the physical leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚角度（Lead Angle）**：引脚相对 ROI 的方向角。: **Lead Angle**: lead direction relative to the ROI.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚阈值（Lead Threshold）**：基于每个引脚子 ROI 的 A: **Lead Threshold**: AI-score threshold applied to each per-lead sub-ROI.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接阈值（Bridge Threshold）**：相邻引脚间连锡（短路）的: **Bridge Threshold**: AI-decision threshold for solder bridges (shorts) between adjacent leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接宽度 (mm)（Bridge Width (mm)）**：相邻引脚间桥接: **Bridge Width (mm)**: absolute width of the bridge-detection band between adjacent leads, in millimeters.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**间隙宽度 (%)（Gap Width）**：相邻引脚间桥接检测带宽度（按间隙: **Gap Width (%)**: bridge-detection band width expressed as a percentage of the lead gap, centered between the leads to reduce edge interference.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚忽略列表 / 桥接忽略列表**：选择不参与检测的引脚 / 桥接（从左到右: **Lead Ignore List / Bridge Ignore List**: leads or bridges to exclude from inspection (numbered left to right).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用可视化（Enable Visualization）**：显示各子区域二值: **Enable Visualization**: displays the per-zone binarization and ratio statistics. Recommended only while tuning.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**使用共享参数（Use Shared Parameters）**：开启后，对同: **Use Shared Parameters**: when on, every lead feature of this type within the same component shares one parameter set; turn it off to tune a single feature independently.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊料颜色范围（Solder Color Range）/ 焊盘颜色范围（Pad: **Solder Color Range / Pad Color Range / Tip Color Range**: HSV or Tricolor color formula configured independently for each of the three sub-zones.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊料 / 焊盘 / 引脚 有效比例范围（Valid Ratio Range）: **Solder / Pad / Tip Valid Ratio Range**: the OK valid-ratio band for each sub-zone.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接颜色公式（Bridge Color Formula）**：选择用于间隙区: **Bridge Color Formula**: color formula used to detect solder bridges in the gap region (e.g. ``2B-R-G`` or Tricolor); when **Tricolor** is chosen, configure **Tricolor X / Y / Z / A**.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**灵敏度（Sensitivity）**：间隙桥接颜色检测灵敏度（0–1），值越: **Sensitivity**: sensitivity of the gap-region bridge color detection (0–1). Higher values widen the band.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接颜色范围（Bridge Color Range）/ 桥接有效比例范围（B: **Bridge Color Range / Bridge Valid Ratio Range**: used by the solder-bridge detection.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.开启 **启用高级设置（enable_advanced_solder_crite: When **Enable Advanced Settings** (``enable_advanced_solder_criteria``) is on and a lead's valid ratio falls outside its **Valid Ratio Range**, a second pass runs to reduce false positives, using the thresholds below:
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊料平均阈值（Solder Mean Threshold）**：比较该引脚焊: **Solder Mean Threshold**: compares this lead's solder valid ratio against the average across all leads; a deviation larger than the threshold counts as OK.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊料邻域阈值（Solder Neighbor Threshold）**：比较: **Solder Neighbor Threshold**: compares this lead's solder valid ratio against its neighbors; a deviation larger than the threshold counts as OK.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊盘平均阈值（Pad Mean Threshold）/ 焊盘邻域阈值（Pad: **Pad Mean Threshold / Pad Neighbor Threshold**: same mean and neighbor comparisons applied to the Pad zone, used to decide lifted leads.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**最小焊料焊盘差异（Min Solder Pad Difference）**：: **Min Solder–Pad Difference**: compares the solder zone against the pad zone on the same lead. Normally solder > pad; too small a gap means the pad is exposed and solder is insufficient — likely a lifted lead.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚尖端有效比例范围（Tip Valid Ratio Range）**：引脚: **Tip Valid Ratio Range**: the OK ratio band for the Tip zone.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚平均上限阈值（Tip Mean Upper Threshold）/ 平均: **Tip Mean Upper / Lower Threshold**: flags the lead set as abnormal when the mean Tip valid ratio across all leads exceeds the upper limit or falls below the lower limit.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.判定流程：先检查有效比例是否在 **有效比例范围** 内，若在范围内 ⇒ OK；: Decision flow: first check whether the valid ratio sits inside the **Valid Ratio Range**. Inside ⇒ OK. Outside ⇒ run the second pass; if either the **mean threshold** or the **neighbor threshold** is satisfied ⇒ OK; if neither ⇒ NG.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**引脚末端 / 焊盘误报**：与 v1 相同 —— 元件末端无红色时关闭 **: **False positives on the Tip or Pad zones**: same advice as v1 — turn off the **Tip** sub-check when the lead tip has no red solder, and turn off the **Pad** sub-check when the lead doesn't expose a clear pad area.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.针对插装（DIP）器件的焊点检测，可结合颜色范围与自定义模型。: Solder-joint inspection for DIP (through-hole) components. Combines color-range analysis with an optional custom-trained model.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中的 DIP 检测元件示例: Example of a DIP inspection component in the Template Editor
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**DIP 类型（DIP Type）/ 子类型（Sub Type）**：选择 D: **DIP Type / Sub Type**: pick the DIP solder-joint category.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**自定义模型（Custom Model）**：选用为该焊点类型训练的自定义分类: **Custom Model**: select a custom classifier trained for this solder-joint type.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**置信度阈值（Confidence Threshold）**：模型判定的置信度: **Confidence Threshold**: confidence cutoff used by the model.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点数量（Solder Count）/ 焊点宽度 (mm)（Solder W: **Solder Count / Solder Width (mm)**: divide the ROI into equal solder-joint sub-frames.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接宽度 (%)（Bridge Width）**：相邻焊点连锡检测带宽度。: **Bridge Width (%)**: width of the bridge-detection band between adjacent solder joints.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用焊点颜色范围检测（Enable Solder Color Range C: **Enable Solder Color Range Criteria**: when on, the color range serves as a secondary decision input.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点颜色公式（Solder Color Formula）**：选择 HSV: **Solder Color Formula**: choose **HSV** or **Tricolor**; when **Tricolor** is chosen, configure **Tricolor X / Y / Z / A** coefficients.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点颜色中心色调（Solder Color Center Hue）/ 焊点颜: **Solder Color Center Hue / Center Saturation**: HSV reference point (HSV mode only).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点颜色起始色调（Solder Color Start Hue）/ 焊点颜色: **Solder Color Start Hue / End Hue**: start and end angles of the hue range.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点颜色起始明度（Solder Color Start Value）/ 焊点: **Solder Color Start Value / End Value**: brightness band that valid pixels must fall within.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点颜色有效比率范围（Solder Color Valid Ratio Ra: **Solder Color Valid Ratio Range**: the OK valid-ratio band for the solder color.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.检测 DIP 器件相邻引脚 / 焊点之间的连锡。: Detects solder bridges between adjacent leads or solder joints on DIP components.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接颜色公式（Bridge Color Formula）**：选择用于识别连: **Bridge Color Formula**: choose the color formula used to detect solder bridges (e.g. ``2B-R-G``); when **Tricolor** is chosen, configure **Tricolor X / Y / Z / A**.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**灵敏度（Sensitivity）**：桥接颜色检测灵敏度（0–1），值越大检: **Sensitivity**: sensitivity of the bridge color detection (0–1). Higher values widen the detection band.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接有效比率范围（Bridge Valid Ratio Range）**：连: **Bridge Valid Ratio Range**: OK band for the bridge valid ratio.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**桥接宽度 (%)（Bridge Width）**：桥接检测带宽度。: **Bridge Width (%)**: width of the bridge-detection band.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**焊点数量（Solder Count）/ 焊点宽度 (mm)（Solder W: **Solder Count / Solder Width (mm)**: defines how the ROI is divided into solder-joint sub-frames.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**DIP 桥接敏感度怎么调**：与普通桥接相同 —— **灵敏度** 小时只抽: **How to tune DIP bridge sensitivity**: same advice as the standard Bridge tool — a low **Sensitivity** picks up only blue pixels, while a high value also includes reddish pixels.

complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.识别并校验检测框内文本（丝印、字符、批次 / 日期等），同时支持 OCR（识别字: Reads and verifies the text inside the inspection box — silkscreen, characters, batch / date codes, and so on. Supports both OCR (recognize character content) and OCV (compare against a reference image).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.模板编辑器中绘制对应 ROI 后，在参数面板中配置该工具的参数。: Draw the corresponding ROI in the Template Editor, then configure the tool's parameters in the parameter panel.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**用途**：识别并校验检测框内文本（丝印、字符、批次 / 日期等）。检测框上的: **Purpose**: read and verify text inside the inspection box (silkscreen, characters, batch / date codes, and so on). The triangle on the ROI indicates the reading direction and should match the actual character orientation. Supports both OCR (recognize character content) and OCV (compare against a reference image).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**期望文本（Expected Text）/ 期望文本 (反向)（Expecte: **Expected Text / Expected Text Reverse**: the expected string; the reverse variant is used for the 180°-rotated reading direction.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用 OCR（Enable OCR）**：识别检测框内字符内容并与期望文本比: **Enable OCR**: read the characters in the ROI and compare them against the expected text.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用 OCV（Enable OCV）**：将检测框与 **OCV 参考（OC: **Enable OCV**: compare the ROI against the **OCV References** images and output the **OCV Best Match Score**.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**OCV 接受阈值（OCV Acceptance Threshold）**：提: **OCV Acceptance Threshold**: raise this threshold to reduce false negatives.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**OCR/OCV 通过条件（Pass Condition）**：可选 **OC: **Pass Condition** for OCR/OCV: choose either **OCR AND OCV must pass** or **OCR OR OCV passes**.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**最大不匹配字符数（Max Mismatch Count）**：与期望文本比较: **Max Mismatch Count**: maximum number of mismatched characters allowed against the expected text (the mismatch count is only shown when the recognized string and the reference are the same length).
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**模糊模式（Blur Mode）**：启用后形状相似的字符（如 ``1`` /: **Blur Mode**: when on, look-alike characters (such as ``1`` and ``l``) are accepted as matches; entries can be added to the look-alike table via feedback.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**双向检测（Bidirectional Inspection）**：进行 0°: **Bidirectional Inspection**: runs recognition twice — at 0° and 180° — and passes when either direction matches.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**启用旋转（Enable Rotation）/ 自动搜索文本位置（Auto s: **Enable Rotation / Auto search text location**: when the text is offset within the ROI, runs a broader search to keep recognition stable.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**OCR vs OCV 怎么选**：OCR 识别具体字符内容（需要验证字符是什: **OCR vs. OCV — which to use**: OCR reads the actual character content (use it when you need to know *what* the character is); OCV only checks that the appearance matches the reference (it doesn't recognize the content). OCR is usually more stable with fewer false positives; switch to OCV when characters are blurry or the font is unusual.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**OCR 检测框画多大**: **How large should the OCR box be**: roughly **20% wider than the text** is enough. A larger box risks picking up neighboring characters.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**OCR 检测框画多大**：建议比文字宽约 **20% 左右** 即可，过大容: **How large should the OCR box be**: roughly **20% wider than the text** is enough. A larger box risks picking up neighboring characters.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**白底黑字 / 黄底黑字识别失败**：当前部分背景色组合 OCR 模型支持有限: **Recognition fails on black-on-white or black-on-yellow text**: the current OCR model has limited support for some background combinations. Disable OCR and switch to OCV — compare against the reference appearance instead.
complete_user_guide/config/detection_too.**手动添加的文本检测框识别不出**：先确认字符方向与 OCR 框内方向一致，必: **A manually-added text box doesn't recognize**: first make sure the character orientation matches the direction indicated by the OCR box. If needed, enable **Bidirectional Inspection** or **Enable Rotation**.
